title: Cobblemon for the bros
description: A modpack i created to play cobblemon with a personal twist
body: Just another cobblemon modpack with a few addons to enhance the cobblemon experience like: Combat music, pokenav, more pokemon model for pokemon showdown and many more little things. Some decoration mods like [Macaw's](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-furniture) and [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped), some exploration with [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) and [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether) and many optimization mods like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) and [Modern fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) and even more QoL mods to make Minecraft smoother amd prettier than ever just like with [Fresh animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations).
